title: Digest — Mar 27, 2026, 06:51 AM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog

## Major Features
- **Two-stage Pathfinding for Mining**: We've implemented a new two-stage pathfinding system for cross-z underground mining. This improves navigation by correctly routing through mandatory cave entrances, preventing A* from wasting nodes exploring unnecessary surface tiles. This adjustment will enhance the efficiency of your dwarves when mining underground.

## Fixes and Improvements
- **Cave Entrance Placement**: The cave entrance tile is now properly placed at z=0 once scouting is complete, ensuring that the pathfinding system can correctly identify entry points.
- **Auth Navigator Improvements**: Adjustments have been made to bypass authentication navigator locks, enhancing overall system fluidity.
- **Lock Function Type Signature**: The type signature for `LockFunc` has been corrected to enhance compatibility and functionality across the system.

We hope these improvements make your experience in Pwarf even more enjoyable!

## Merged PRs
- PR #739
